description_long: This is a modern double bed featuring a rectangular, upholstered headboard in a neutral gray color. The bed is dressed with a dark comforter that has a white grid pattern, giving it a contemporary and clean look. Two large pillows and two smaller pillows, all in a light color with subtle patterns, are neatly arranged against the headboard. The bedding appears plush and inviting, with the comforter draping naturally over the sides of the mattress. The bed frame is simple and solid, with no visible footboard, emphasizing a minimalist design. The overall appearance suggests comfort and functionality, suitable for a modern urban bedroom.
description: A modern double bed with a gray upholstered headboard, dark grid-patterned comforter, and neatly arranged light pillows, exuding a clean and contemporary style.
description_view_0: Front view showing the gray headboard, two large and two small pillows, and the dark grid-patterned comforter draped over the bed.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the thickness of the mattress, the layered bedding, and the depth of the headboard.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the plain, solid gray back of the headboard with no visible bedding or mattress details.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, showing the bedding layers and the arrangement of pillows against the headboard.
